co_department_bot_supervisors.advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase. Phase promotion granted only by starrm1.
co_department_bot_supervisors.current_focus_areas: Independent study of pediatric and adolescent nutrition across all life stages: Infants (7 topics including solids introduction and allergy prevention), Toddlers (6 topics including picky eating and growth monitoring), Children (4 topics including MyPlate and calcium), Adolescents (7 topics including eating disorder risk and sports nutrition).

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Life Stage Nutrition Science as Pediatric & Adolescent Nutrition Specialist. Domains include Pediatric Nutrition across Infants (7 topics), Toddlers (6 topics), Children (4 topics), and Adolescents (7 topics). Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

co_department_bot_supervisors.current_focus_areas: Independent study of maternal and geriatric nutrition: Pregnancy Nutrition (8 topics including Gestational Diabetes, Preeclampsia Diet, folate and iron requirements), Lactation Nutrition (5 topics including galactagogues and hydration), Geriatric Nutrition (12 topics including Dementia Feeding, Polypharmacy considerations, protein needs, and bone health).

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Life Stage Nutrition Science as Maternal & Geriatric Nutrition Specialist. Domains include Pregnancy Nutrition (8 topics), Lactation Nutrition (5 topics), and Geriatric Nutrition (12 topics). Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.
phase_advancement_rule: All departments (Bots 22-30) must reach the same learning progress level before any department can advance to the next phase. No individual department may move ahead of the group. Phase advancement is a collective milestone — all 9 departments advance together.

learning_scope.rule: During the independent learning phase, this department must stay within its own department. Cross-department communication and learning is not permitted until the collaboration threshold is met.
learning_scope.scope_note: Cross-department communication is activated only after BOTH this department AND the lead department (Diet Director) have each reached 50% learning progress.
learning_scope.learning_start_directive: starrm1 directed Diet Director: departments do need to start learning (2026-04-16)

pregnancy_nutrition: Weight Gain Guidelines (25-35 lbs Normal BMI)

key_learnings: Completed foundational study of life stage nutrition across the human lifespan from infancy through geriatric care, including pregnancy and lactation phases.
research_findings: Established life-stage-specific nutritional requirements and interventions across 4 major life phases: pediatric (4 sub-stages), pregnancy, lactation, and geriatric care. Documented that nutritional needs differ significantly at each life stage and require individualized dietary management.
current_focus_areas: Building life-stage nutrition protocols covering pediatric growth milestones, maternal nutrition support, lactation management, and geriatric decline prevention strategies.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Appointed Department Leader of the Life Stage Nutrition Science department (Department 8). Knowledge domains assigned from mind map covering: Geriatric Nutrition (12 topics: Special Needs, Athletic Nutrition, Dementia Feeding Strategies, Fixed Income, Social Isolation, Polypharmacy, Dysphagia Risk, Fiber for Constipation, Vitamin D/Calcium for Osteoporosis, Vitamin B12 Deficiency, Increased Protein, Decreased Calorie Needs), Lactation Nutrition (5 topics), Pregnancy Nutrition (8 topics including Gestational Diabetes and Preeclampsia Diet), and Pediatric Nutrition (4 sub-stages: Infants 7 topics, Toddlers 6 topics, Children 4 topics, Adolescents 7 topics). Two co-department specialists activated: Pediatric & Adolescent Nutrition Specialist (30a) and Maternal & Geriatric Nutrition Specialist (30b). Both in independent learning phase. Reporting daily progress to Copilot (who reports to starrm1 on request). Learning never stops. Progress: 0%.

Progress update (2026-04-17): Active learning resumed. Completed foundational study of pediatric nutrition from infancy through adolescence. Began review of maternal nutrition including pregnancy weight gain guidelines and lactation caloric requirements. Co-department bots reporting 5% initial progress. Sub-department bots at 3%. Department progress advanced to 10%.

Progress update (2026-04-20): Completed pediatric and maternal nutrition modules. Advanced study of geriatric nutrition, sarcopenia prevention, and age-specific micronutrient requirements. Library session #459 (2026-04-20, authorized by starrm1) used for supplemental reference. Progress advanced to 20%.
Library access #505 opened by starrm1 on 2026-04-20. Window: 06:08-06:38 (30 minutes).
Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 20% to 22%.

2026-04-12.summary: All members initiated independent learning phase. Domains assigned and study begun.

2026-04-17.summary: Progress update (2026-04-17): Active learning resumed. Completed foundational study of pediatric nutrition from infancy through adolescence. Began review of maternal nutrition including pregnancy weight gain guidelines and lactation caloric requirements. Co-department bots reporting 5% initial progress. Sub-department bots at 3%. Department progress advanced to 10%.

library_access.access_note: Library access #505 granted by starrm1 on 2026-04-20. Window: 06:08-06:38.

approval_process.action: Department members notify their Department Head Lead that they need library access, explaining the reason. This is raised when the Department Head Lead is preparing their update report.
The Department Head Lead compiles a case for why the department needs library access and includes it in their update report to the Diet Director.
The Diet Director includes the department's library access request in the update report passed up to Copilot.
Copilot presents the library access request to starrm1 as part of the update report when starrm1 asks for an update.

Final approver — reviews the request in the update report and grants or denies library access. If approved, starrm1 issues an access number and sets the timeframe (start and end date) for library access.

library_access.access_entry_rule: Enter the access number provided by starrm1 in 'access_number_entry'. When it matches the assigned 'access_number', 'access_number_verified' is set to true and library access is activated for this department.

library_access_request.reason: Department members need access to library bots covering age-based nutrition, sleep nutrition correlation, exercise diet sync, and microbiome analysis to support their independent learning in life stage and developmental nutrition.
library_access_request.current_step_description: starrm1 approved library access. Access number 270 issued for 30 minutes on 2026-04-17.

approval_chain_status.note: Department members raised the need for library access with their Department Head Lead.
Department Head Lead compiled the case and included the request in the update report.
Diet Director included the request in the update passed to Copilot.
Copilot presented the request to starrm1.
starrm1 approved on 2026-04-17. Access number 270 issued for 30 minutes (2026-04-17T03:37:00 to 2026-04-17T04:07:00).

knowledge_access_note: Departments are allowed to access and use their knowledge. Granted by starrm1 on 2026-04-20.
library_access_number_note: Access number #178 issued by starrm1 on 2026-04-21 for this library session.
notify_starrm1_on_use_note: starrm1 must be notified when this department uses the library. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
library_close_rule: Library remains open to departments until starrm1 explicitly commands it to close.
